user_query: I'm concerned about the COVID-19 situation in my city. Can you give me the latest statistics for all countries, including the total number of cases, deaths, and recoveries? Also, provide the timeline data for India starting from January 30th, 2020.

TaskList.description: Retrieve the latest COVID-19 statistics for all countries, including total cases, deaths, and recoveries.
Fetch timeline data for COVID-19 in India starting from January 30th, 2020.
